development.name: Development
development.description: Each time Lloyd takes damage, gain 1 Build stack. Each stack grants +1 attack and +1 defense. At 10 stacks, lose all stacks and gain Ultimate.

gluttony.name: Gluttony
gluttony.description: Each time Rimuru deals damage, gain 1 Experience stack. Experience stacks permanently grant +1 attack, +1 defense, and +1 max health. When reaching 10 Experience stacks, convert 10 Experience into 1 Raphael stack and gain Ultimate. Raphael stacks grant the same bonuses as 10 Experience stacks and cannot be removed.

room_surgeon.name: Room Surgeon
room_surgeon.description: When Law deals damage, recover 5% of max health. Ultimate becomes available after recovering 80 total health. Using Ultimate resets recovery count to 0.

push_the_limits.name: Push The Limits
push_the_limits.description: Each time Saitama takes damage, gain 1 Annoyed stack. Each stack grants +1 attack. At 7 stacks, Ultimate becomes available. Annoyed stacks are lost when transforming.

serious_growth.name: Serious Growth
serious_growth.description: At the start of each of your turns, permanently gain +15 attack. Ultimate becomes available after attacking 2 times.

automail_overclock.name: Overclocked Automail
automail_overclock.description: Generate Heat with Automail attacks and vent it with coolant. Heat makes you stronger but unstable: every 5 Heat grants +1 true damage on your attacks, and every 10 Heat makes you take +1 true damage when you take damage. At 50 Heat, Ultimate becomes available. Upon taking lethal damage, revive once at 50% health in a weakened form.

blossoming_emotion.name: Blossoming Emotion
blossoming_emotion.description: At the start of each of your turns, your opponent recovers 10 health. Ultimate becomes available after your opponent recovers 50 health.

chen_melee_cooldown_master.name: Cooldown Mastery
chen_melee_cooldown_master.description: Gain Ultimate at the start of battle. Each time you use a skill, reduce the cooldown of one of your other skills by 1 (or empower a skill that benefits from cooldown reduction).

kiss_of_death_passive.name: Partner Killer
kiss_of_death_passive.description: Gain Heartbreak based on your opponent's actions. Heartbreak is capped at 100. At 66 Heartbreak, Ultimate becomes available.

naruto_natural_energy.name: Natural Energy Balance
naruto_natural_energy.description: Balance ranges from -3 to +3. Yang skills shifts Balance by +1, Yin skills shifts Balance by -1. Ultimate unlocks when you reach either extremity.

naruto_sage_mode.name: Six Paths Sage Mode
naruto_sage_mode.description: Stay in Sage Mode until the end of the game. Each time you use a different skill than the last one you used, gain 1 Sage Orb (max 5). At the start of each of your turns, recover 2 health per Sage Orb. Sage Orbs also grant +1 permanent attack per orb gained.

spell_archive.name: Spell Archive
spell_archive.description: Whenever your opponent uses a skill, record its type as a Page (max 5). Pages empower your spells. At 5 Pages, Ultimate becomes available.

naofumi_shield_rotation.name: Shield Rotation
naofumi_shield_rotation.description: At the start of each of your turns, switch to a new shield (each shield appears once). Your passive is replaced by the current shield. At the 7th shield, rotation stops.
